title: Were the apostles initiates of an ancient mystery school?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses the theory that Jesus and his apostles may have been part of an ancient mystery school tradition, focusing on Jesus's use of parables as a form of secret teaching meant only for initiates rather than the general public.

key_claims.claim: When Jesus explains why he speaks in parables, he uses the Greek word 'muston' which means a religious secret to be confided only to the initiated
The Greek Lexicon defines 'muston' as a religious secret not to be communicated to ordinary mortals
Christianity was born with secrets and visions as part of its foundation
